title: polypodium baileyi
intro: Polypodium baileyi, also known as the Australian Polypody, is a type of fern native to eastern Australia, classified under the family Polypodiaceae. The medicinal properties of Polypodium baileyi include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant is known for its health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory problems, and providing relief from skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Polypodium baileyi can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
